user.description:
Set up Renogy BLE device: {device_name}. 

Default polling interval: {default_interval} seconds.

reconfigure.description:
Reconfigure Renogy BLE device: {device_name}. 

Current device type: {current_device_type}. Changing the device type replaces the entities with the set matching the new type.

error.unsupported_model: This device model is not yet supported by this integration.

abort.not_supported_device: This device is not a supported Renogy BLE device
abort.unsupported_device_type: The {device_type} device type is not currently supported. Only controller, battery, DCC (DC-DC charger), inverter, and shunt300 devices are fully supported at this time.
